CustomField.label: Skipped Checks Display
CustomField.description: Controls what happens to checks that are SKIPPED (they did not apply to this record). Show each row keeps them listed. Hide rows, show count only removes the skipped rows from the list; their count still appears in the summary bar at the bottom of the card.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Show each row = list every skipped check. Hide rows, show count only = remove skipped rows from the list (the count still shows in the summary bar at the bottom of the card).
